notes: Reset this file whenever the `paths_to_mutate` or `tests_dir` lists in `api/pyproject.toml` [tool.mutmut] change — a baseline tied to a different mutation surface is not a fair comparison. Re-run `mutmut run && mutmut export-cicd-stats`, read `killed / (total - no_tests - skipped)` from `mutants/mutmut-cicd-stats.json`, and update `baseline_kill_rate` here. See `planning/harness/scope.md` §2.5 for the rationale and `api/scripts/check_mutation_drift.py` for what the nightly workflow does with this number.
